name: Moroccan Stew (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup water or veggie broth for sauteing
1 to 2 cups water or veggie broth for stewing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, saute onions and garlic in water or veggie broth until onions are translucent.
2. Add cumin, turmeric, cinnamon, cayenne, and paprika to the pot. Stir well.
3. Add sweet potatoes, zucchini, summer squash, carrots, tomatoes, green bell pepper, and garbanzo beans. Stir to combine.
4. Pour in 1 cup of water or veggie broth and stir again.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low. Cover and let it cook for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender.
6. Add more water if needed to reach desired consistency.
7. Remove from heat and stir in raisins (if using).
8. Serve over couscous or rice.
Servings: a lot!
